report_name: Japan Introduces New National Strategy to Defend Critical Infrastructure from Cyberattacks

identities.name: Government of Japan
identities.description: Adopted a new, whole-of-government strategy to bolster the cybersecurity of the nation's critical infrastructure in response to escalating threats amplified by Artificial Intelligence (AI).

identities.name: Cabinet Secretariat's National Cybersecurity Office
identities.description: A key Japanese government body involved in the new critical infrastructure cyber defense initiative, responsible for leading information-sharing.

identities.name: National Police Agency
identities.description: A key Japanese government body involved in the new critical infrastructure cyber defense initiative.

identities.name: Financial Services Agency
identities.description: A key Japanese government body involved in the new critical infrastructure cyber defense initiative.

identities.description: A key Japanese government body involved in the new critical infrastructure cyber defense initiative.
